接口 DocAnnotationConstants

public interface DocAnnotationConstants
java annotations

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    static final String
    CONSUMES
    The name of the 'consumes' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify the media types that the annotated handler method can consume.
    static final String
    DEFAULT_VALUE_PROP
    annotation defaultValue prop
    static final String
    DEPRECATED
    Deprecated annotation
    static final String

    GROUP_PROP
    annotation groups prop
    static final String

    issue #484 gson alias annotation
    static final String
    IGNORE_PROP
    Fastjson JSONType annotation ignores prop com.alibaba.fastjson2.annotation.JSONType#ignores

    JSON_FORMAT_LOCALE_PROP

    Jackson JsonFormat annotation pattern prop com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat#pattern
    static final String

    static final String
    JSON_VALUE
    Jackson JsonValue annotation com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonValue
    static final String
    METHOD
    The name of the 'method' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify the HTTP request methods that the annotated handler method supports.
    static final String
    NAME_PROP
    annotation name prop
    static final String
    ON_MESSAGE
    `@javax.websocket.OnMessage` or `@jakarta.websocket.OnMessage` annotation name javax.websocket.OnMessage jakarta.websocket.OnMessage
    static final String
    ON_OPEN
    `@javax.websocket.OnOpen` or `@jakarta.websocket.OnOpen` annotation name javax.websocket.OnOpen jakarta.websocket.OnOpen
    static final String
    PARAMS
    The name of the 'params' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify HTTP request parameters that must be present for the mapping to be matched.
    static final String[]
    PATH_MAPPING_PROPS
    Common property names used to define request mapping paths.
    static final String
    PATH_PARAM
    `@javax.websocket.server.PathParam` or `@jakarta.websocket.PathParam` annotation name javax.websocket.server.PathParam jakarta.websocket.server.PathParam
    static final String
    PATH_PROP
    annotation path prop
    static final String
    PRODUCES
    The name of the 'produces' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify the media types that the annotated handler method can produce.
    static final String

    • PATH_PARAM

      static final String PATH_PARAM
      `@javax.websocket.server.PathParam` or `@jakarta.websocket.PathParam` annotation name javax.websocket.server.PathParam jakarta.websocket.server.PathParam
      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • CONSUMES

      static final String CONSUMES
      The name of the 'consumes' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify the media types that the annotated handler method can consume.

      Corresponds to org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping#consumes()

      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • PRODUCES

      static final String PRODUCES
      The name of the 'produces' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify the media types that the annotated handler method can produce.

      Corresponds to org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping#produces()

      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • METHOD

      static final String METHOD
      The name of the 'method' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify the HTTP request methods that the annotated handler method supports.

      Corresponds to org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping#method()

      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • PARAMS

      static final String PARAMS
      The name of the 'params' attribute in Spring MVC request mapping annotations, used to specify HTTP request parameters that must be present for the mapping to be matched.

      Corresponds to org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping#params()

      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • PATH_MAPPING_PROPS

      static final String[] PATH_MAPPING_PROPS
      Common property names used to define request mapping paths. Typically used in annotations like @RequestMapping, @GetMapping, etc. Corresponds to 'value' and 'path' attributes which are synonyms in Spring MVC.

      Used to configure URL mapping paths for handler methods.
